data.name: Dushevnaya

weaponImprint.name: Eulogistic Verse
weaponImprint.trait: If a phase weakness is exploited, ignores 10% of the target's defense. If it is a Freeze phase weakness, ignores another 10% of defense.
weaponImprint.effect: When the user has [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], increases damage dealt by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. Before an allied unit makes an active attack, if the target has Freeze debuffs, increases the Freeze damage by 5%/6%/7%/8%/9%/10%. If the target has [effect:f4fc6af5-7a01-48a3-91e2-e432a7216dbc], this damage increase is enhanced to 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Increase damage dealt to Marley Thermal Power Plant by 2.5%; if the target has [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae], increase the damage dealt by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: A highly sensitive Doll who has lost her neural records, persistently searching for her past and wholeheartedly fulfilling the requests of others. The way she expresses her emotions can be both somewhat exaggerated and immature, often leaving others puzzles in her wake. In truth, these mannerisms are simply a way to mask her own awkwardness and insecurities.

skills.name: Daybreak
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Blessed Artwork
skills.description:
Increases all allied units' damage by 10%, with an additional 10% boost specifically for Freeze damage. At the end of the action, gains 2 points of Confectance Index.

When the user's HP is above 80%, reduces stability damage taken by 1 point and gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194]. While under the effects of [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], increases the range of active skills and Support Attacks (except Ultimates) by 1 tile.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Increases all allied units' damage by 10%, with an additional 10% boost specifically for Freeze damage. Attacks ignore 15% of the target's Cover damage reduction.

At the start of the action, generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles within a 1 tile radius around the user for 2 turns. If the user is standing on an allied Freeze tile, their stability damage is increased by 1 point. At the end of the action, gains 2 points of Confectance Index.

When the user's HP is above 80%, reduces stability damage taken by 1 point and gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194]. While under the effects of [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], increases the range of active skills and Support Attacks (except Ultimates) by 1 tile.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Increases all allied units' damage by 20%, with an additional 40% boost for Freeze damage. Attacks ignore 15% of the target's Cover damage reduction.

At the start of the action, generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles within a 1 tile radius around the user for 2 turns. If the user is positioned on an allied Freeze tile, their stability damage is increased by 1 point. At the end of the action, gains 2 points of Confectance Index.

When the user's HP is above 80%, reduce stability damage taken by 1 point and gains [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194]. While under the effects of [effect:4b5fd3bb-8d4a-44e7-ba99-b48331d2e194], increases the range of active skills and Support Attacks (except Ultimates) by 1 tile.

After an active attack, cleanses 1 defense buff from the target. If the user is positioned on an allied Freeze tile, applies [effect:cc1ca7a9-6314-4501-86b9-4f88892c00a6] to the target for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Attacks ignore 15% of the target's Cover damage reduction.

At the start of the action, generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles within a 1 tile radius around the user for 2 turns. If the user is standing on an allied Freeze tile, their stability damage is increased by 1 point.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Increases the damage of active attacks by 20%, with an additional 40% boost for Freeze damage. After an active attack, cleanses 1 defense buff from the target. If the user is standing on an allied Freeze tile, applies [effect:cc1ca7a9-6314-4501-86b9-4f88892c00a6] to the target for 2 turns.

skills.name: Hero's Code
skills.description:
Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 110% of attack to them.

If this kills an enemy unit with Freeze debuffs, gains 1 stack of [effect:cbc18b63-cd24-4629-85c3-dbd9d290481b].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 110% of attack to them.

If this kills an enemy unit with Freeze debuffs, gains 2 stacks of [effect:cbc18b63-cd24-4629-85c3-dbd9d290481b].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The number of [effect:cbc18b63-cd24-4629-85c3-dbd9d290481b] stacks gained increases by 1. When the number of stacks reaches 4, the skill's effect is enhanced, increasing the damage dealt to 140%. If the target is on an allied Freeze tile, the damage dealt increases to 160%.

skills.name: Marzanna's Sanction
skills.description:
Selects 1 tile within 6 tiles, dealing AoE Freeze Damage equal to 50% of attack to all enemy targets within 2 tiles of the selected tile, and generates [effect:3c3d2b25-6823-4ce4-a33e-cf69e0e759a5] tiles for 2 turns. The next use of this skill will be enhanced, increasing the damage multiplier to 70%, whilst applying [effect:f4fc6af5-7a01-48a3-91e2-e432a7216dbc] for 1 turn. This enhancement cannot be triggered again if the skill has already been enhanced.

If Confectance Index is full, Marzanna's Sanction can immediately be used again.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 tile within 6 tiles, dealing AoE Freeze Damage equal to 70% of attack to all enemy targets within 3 tiles of the selected tile, and generates Frost tiles for 2 turns. The next use of this skill will be enhanced, increasing the damage multiplier to 90%, whilst applying [effect:f4fc6af5-7a01-48a3-91e2-e432a7216dbc] for 1 turn. This enhancement cannot be triggered again if the skill has already been enhanced.

If Confectance Index is full, Marzanna's Sanction can immediately be used again.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Effective range is increased by 1 tile. The initial damage multiplier is increased to 70%. Thish will be further increased to 90% for the enhanced skill.

skills.name: Book of Prophecy
skills.description:
Applies 1 stack of [effect:a19d6142-2b6d-4cd4-bedf-072f15ec68fb] to all allied units within 7 tiles. Gains 2 points of Confectance Index, as well as [effect:2029722c-48e9-40e7-bcf5-609dba9ba155] for 2 turns.

While [effect:2029722c-48e9-40e7-bcf5-609dba9ba155] is active, gains 2 points of Confectance Index if it is at 0 at the end of the action.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Applies 1 stack of [effect:a19d6142-2b6d-4cd4-bedf-072f15ec68fb], [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827], as well as 1 random powerful buff to all allied units within 9 tiles for 2 turns. Gains 2 points of Confectance Index, as well as [effect:2029722c-48e9-40e7-bcf5-609dba9ba155] for 2 turns.

While [effect:2029722c-48e9-40e7-bcf5-609dba9ba155] is active, gains 2 points of Confectance Index if it is at 0 at the end of the action.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Applies 2 stacks of [effect:a19d6142-2b6d-4cd4-bedf-072f15ec68fb], [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827], as well as 1 random powerful buff to all allied units within 9 tiles for 2 turns. Cleanses 1 buff from 4 random enemy units within range. Grants 2 points of Confectance Index, as well as [effect:2029722c-48e9-40e7-bcf5-609dba9ba155] for 2 turns.

While [effect:2029722c-48e9-40e7-bcf5-609dba9ba155] is active, ignores 30% of the target's defense and gains 2 points of Confectance Index if it is at 0 at the end of the action.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increases the effective range by 2 tiles and applies 1 random powerful buff and [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] to all allied units within range for 2 turns. [effect:a19d6142-2b6d-4cd4-bedf-072f15ec68fb] increases damage dealt by an additional 10%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Cleanses 1 buff from 4 random enemy units within range. Increases the number of [effect:a19d6142-2b6d-4cd4-bedf-072f15ec68fb] stacks applied by 1. While [effect:2029722c-48e9-40e7-bcf5-609dba9ba155] is active, ignores 30% of the target's defense. The maximum number of Support Attacks increases by 1.

keys.effect: For targets with mobility less than or equal to the user or that cannot move, increases Phase damage dealt by 10%.

When allied units deals Freeze damage, Dushevnaya gains 1 stack of [effect:cbc18b63-cd24-4629-85c3-dbd9d290481b].
Freeze damage dealt by allied units is increased by 5%, up to a maximum of 15%.

Targeted damage dealt by Dushevnaya is converted to Freeze damage and ignores 30% of the target's defense.

Freeze damage dealt to enemy units is increased by 30%.

At the start of battle, damage dealt by the 2 allied Dolls with the highest initial attack (apart from Dushevnaya) is increased by 10%, and increase Freeze damage by 10%.
keys.displayTitle: Expansion Key - Wintersong of the Hero

keys.effect: Each [effect:cbc18b63-cd24-4629-85c3-dbd9d290481b] stack gained above the maximum amount increases the critical rate of Hero's Code by 5%, up to a maximum increase of 30%.
When an active attack only hits 1 target, increases Freeze damage dealt by 20% and stability damage dealt by 2 points.

When an active skill generates Freeze tiles, if there are Freeze tiles that already exist within range, triggers a tile reaction, removes the tiles beneath the enemy targets and cleanses 1 buff from them. For each tile removed, gains 1 stack of [effect:cbc18b63-cd24-4629-85c3-dbd9d290481b], up to 3 stacks.
When using Marzanna's Sanction, if it causes the target to enter Stability Break, applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] to them for 2 turns.
When under the effects of [effect:2029722c-48e9-40e7-bcf5-609dba9ba155], gains immunity to movement debuffs.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 5 - Heart of the Sage

keys.effect: At the start of the turn, if this unit is standing an an allied Freeze tile, 2 debuffs are cleansed.

vertebrae.effect: Increases the effective range by 2 tiles and applies 1 random powerful buff and [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] to all allied units within range for 2 turns. [effect:a19d6142-2b6d-4cd4-bedf-072f15ec68fb] increases damage dealt by an additional 10%.

The way she expresses her emotions can be both somewhat exaggerated and immature, often leaving others puzzles in her wake. In truth, these mannerisms are simply a way to mask her own awkwardness and insecurities.

imagoforms.effect: For every instance of Freeze damage dealt by this unit, Freeze damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 1%, maximum of 3%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Freeze damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
At the start of the battle, the 2 allied units with the highest attack have their attack increased by 3%. Does not stack.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Before an active attack, apply [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae] to the target, increasing damage by 10%. Effective once. This buff cannot be cleansed.

Provides 1 instance of Action Support to an enemy unit within range when they are hit by targeted damage from an ally, dealing 80% of attack as physical damage and 2 points of stability damage. Can trigger up to 2 times per turn. Cannot be cleansed.

Upon reaching 4 stacks, the active skill Hero's Code gains an additional effect, ignoring 15% of the target's Cover damage reduction. The damage is converted into Freeze damage and if the target is on a Freeze tile, damage dealt is increased to 130%. Can stack up to 4 times and is effective once. Cannot be cleansed.
